subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and light shorts, stepping off the curb to cross the suburban street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a cartoon backpack, wears light-up sneakers, tousled hair aglow in the morning sun; red jacket vivid in the low light
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, light summer shorts, light-up sneakers, cartoon backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light tan, smooth youthful skin warmed by the morning sun
subjects.facial_features: Round face, short brown hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: Parked passenger cars lining both sides of the suburban street, roofs glinting in the low morning sun
subjects.appearance_details: A mix of sedans and SUVs in muted colors, clean and modern, long shadows stretching from them across the road
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A North American suburban residential street on a clear golden-hour summer morning. Spacious single-family homes with wide lawns, low fences, and leafy trees line a broad two-lane road of fresh, dry asphalt. Driveways, mailboxes, and parked cars dot the scene; sidewalks and grassy verges edge the homes. The low early sun from the east rakes down the street, throwing long, warm shadows across the smooth pavement and its crisp center markings.

lighting.direction: Low warm sun from the east, casting light straight down the road
lighting.shadows: Long, warm, crisp shadows stretching westward from trees, homes, and parked cars
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm low-angle glow with long shadows and glinting highlights; the child's red jacket glows brightly in the morning sun

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm golden greens of dewy lawns, honeyed sunlight on fresh asphalt, clean house tones, and a glowing red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Fresh, bright summer-morning calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating parked cars, evenly spaced trees, long morning shadow bands across the road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the crossing child

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the suburban residential street in warm golden-hour morning light.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the fresh asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the fresh asphalt, partially faded, its edges lit warmly and casting a faint long shadow in the low sun
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the golden-hour suburban street, long morning shadows and parked cars along the fresh asphalt.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly in the low sun.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely in the morning light.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves smoothly forward down a suburban residential street in warm golden-hour light, long morning shadows striping the fresh asphalt past parked cars and leafy trees. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch in the low sun. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Fresh summer-morning suburban sounds of birdsong and a sprinkler, the steady hum of the vehicle over fresh asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle with morning birdsong.
